stderr_summary: GNU tar exit 1 after ~211 GiB partial write: predominantly Socket ignoriert on gpg-agent, Docker Desktop, ibus cache, and Discord cache sockets; one live journal file change under /var/log/journal/.../system.journal; pipeline ended with 'sh failed with exit status 1'.
